reviews.comment:
Puse una estreya para poder dejar este mensaje . Un desastre no entiendo como el automóvil club puede tenes un servicio como ese . Era niño cuando ya cargaba en el acá. 4 líneas de expendio y solo usan dos .tremenda pérdida de tiempo. Cola de 1 cuadra  .los chicos no pueden atender a todos . Para mi gusto desastre .

(Translated by Google)
I gave it one star so I could leave this message. It's a disaster. I don't understand how the Automobile Club can have such terrible service. I was a kid when I used to fill up here. Four pumps and they only use two. A huge waste of time. The line is a block long. The staff can't serve everyone. In my opinion, it's a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHN3EzSVBREAE
